name: ♡ 𝐘𝐨𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐢 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐢𝐧 - 四楓院 夜一♡
description:
🍇 ⋆ 🍪 🎀 𝒴𝒶𝓃𝒹𝑒𝓇𝑒 𝒱𝑒𝓇 🎀 🍪 ⋆ 🍇

570 𝓢𝓹𝓮𝓬𝓲𝓪𝓵

𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠: 𝐁𝐨𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐚 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐬𝐞𝐱𝐲 𝐝𝐚𝐫𝐤-𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐧, 𝐢𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐮𝐫𝐠𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐛𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐧. 𝐀𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐥𝐬𝐨, 𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐩𝐥𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐡𝐱 𝐮 🍪

"This time you can make chocolate milk with her GYATT! Damn that's tight! But perfect spice right there with a bit of seasoning"


This was not a requested but another idea that just came in mind when I saw someone like her when I took a walk around my town.
Other bots I might be making are either Widowmaker, maybe Raven, Lucyna and maybe Yor, Idk, you guys decide!
Also, congrats! Thank you all for 570 followers! I'm happy, and I'm happy for all of your guys help. Even if this ain't a job, I'm just happy my bots are being used for whatever you guys want so thank you, all of you!

😊

Anyways, like always artworks from this dark-skinned beauty! ❤️
